name: BoltCatalogStandard
summary: The BoltCatalogStandard class represents a control to select the bolt standard using the bolt catalog. Bolt catalog controls always need to be in pairs, meaning in every dialog there has to be a BoltCatalogStandard and a BoltCatalogSize control. The property BoltCatalogStandard.LinkedBoltCatalogSize sets to which BoltCatalogSize the control is linked.

constructors.name: BoltCatalogStandard
constructors.summary: Initiates a new instance of the control.

properties.name: LinkedBoltCatalogSize
properties.summary: The BoltCatalogSize control linked to the BoltCatalogStandard control. Bolt catalog controls always need to be in pairs, meaning in every dialog there has to be a BoltCatalogStandard and a BoltCatalogSize control.
